page: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under a KVM hypervisor, this instance features a 1:2 memory-to-core ratio, providing 64.0 GB of RAM (2.0 GB per core). Local storage is supported by a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is established with a 4 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The CPU configuration lacks hyperthreading, ensuring dedicated execution resources per vCPU.

Benchmark results indicate strong compute capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance ranking in the top tier (top 10%) and multi-core performance in the top 25%. Memory performance is also notable, with the PassMark memory score reaching the top 10% tier, and uncached large-block read bandwidth measured at 227.99 GB/sec. In application-specific tests, the server demonstrates strong performance (top 25%) in software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, and Redis SET operations, while static web serving throughput and medium-model LLM inference fall into the average category.

Given its dedicated core allocation and high-speed NVMe storage, the c3-64 offers high resource density and predictable performance for compute-heavy workloads. The lack of hyperthreading and the 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio represent a tradeoff, prioritizing raw CPU execution over massive memory capacity. This profile is highly suitable for workloads such as software compilation, database operations, text and image processing, and moderate-scale machine learning inference.
description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Utilizing a KVM hypervisor, the instance provides 64.0 GB of RAM, a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and a 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The server lacks hyperthreading, ensuring dedicated execution resources per core. In benchmark evaluations, the c3-64 delivers top-tier single-core CPU and memory performance, alongside strong multi-core, software compilation, and database execution capabilities. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-intensive tasks, trading off a high memory-to-CPU ratio for dedicated processing power. Supported by CPU features like AVX, AES, and SHA_NI, this configuration is well-suited for software compilation, database operations, image processing, and moderate-scale language model inference.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core CPU and memory performance for demanding workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, built for high-performance workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core AMD EPYC server with NVMe storage, optimized for compute-heavy workloads and high-throughput database operations.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with no hyperthreading for predictable compute performance
64.0 GB of system memory paired with a bundled 400 GB local NVMe SSD
Top-tier single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and one complimentary public IPv4 address
Optimized for software compilation, database operations, and text processing
